suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify skill availability expectations - content-worker skill exists at .factory/skills/content-worker/SKILL.md but workers may not be able to invoke it via the Skill tool. Document fallback procedure for when a skill is unavailable.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: lecture8-assessments worker (2f08b84a) encountered 'Skill "content-worker" not found' but completed task correctly by following existing patterns.

featureReviews.summary: Three examples (string-movsb-movsw, string-lodsb-lodsw, string-stosb-stosw) added for L8-S1, L8-S2, L8-S3. MASM syntax correct, comprehensive annotations, common mistakes documented. Validation passed (646 assertions). One non-blocking issue in vowel-counting logic.

Three examples (rep-prefixes-demo, cmpsb-cmpsw-demo, scasb-scasw-demo) added for L8-S4, L8-S5, L8-S6. All examples have valid MASM syntax, proper annotations, common mistakes documented. Validation passed.
Two examples (cld-std-demo, complete-string-processing) added for L8-S7, L8-S8. Both examples have valid MASM syntax, 12+ annotations, 6+ common mistakes, proper provenance. Validation passed.

23 assessment questions (QB-067 to QB-089) added covering all 8 L8 sections. Mix of conceptual and code-tracing types, proper field structure matching existing patterns. Validation passed (761 assertions).
